answers: Best techniques: active recall (test yourself), spaced repetition (review at intervals), and the Feynman technique (teach it).
Active recall: close the book and try to remember. Use flashcards (Anki app). Much better than re-reading.
Study tips: pomodoro (25 min focus, 5 break), study in different locations, teach someone else, and sleep well.
Pora shona tips: active recall koro (nijer test nao), spaced repetition use koro, ar niyomito review koro.
